# Fixture: rebecca_workman_address_change
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 11.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Rebecca! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I am trying to change my new address it won't let me save it

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Open the app → Profile → Personal Details → update your address → tap Save Details. Then quit the app fully and reopen it for the change to take effect — the new address will then appear under the Address Details section.
